onboarding.desc_0: Follow Friday Khutbahs in your language, live and in real time. Stay focused, connected, and engaged wherever you are.
onboarding.desc_1: Choose a nearby mosque and listen to the Khutbah live from your phone. Switch languages, adjust volume, and follow easily.
onboarding.desc_2: Enjoy reliable content or join as a volunteer and make a difference.

terms.title: Sermon Recording Instructions
terms.subtitle: Please follow these instructions to ensure the best recording quality:
terms.item2: Only one recording is allowed per mosque.
terms.item4: Sit close to the imam for clear audio.
terms.item5: Avoid background noise and side conversations.
terms.item6: Start recording at the beginning of the Khutbah.
terms.item7: Stop recording when the Khutbah ends.
terms.item8: Move closer if audio quality is low.
terms.item9: The mosque status will show as Live Recording during capture.
terms.item10: Review the real-time transcript to ensure accuracy.
terms.agree: I agree to follow the recording instructions.
terms.alreadyRecording: Sorry, this mosque is currently being recorded by another user.
terms.weakNetwork: Connection is weak — processing may pause until it improves.
terms.lowAudio: Audio is low — try to move closer to the imam.

help.title: Help and Support
help.subtitle: We are here to help you with any questions, technical issues, or feedback related to Aban.
help.contactText: Need additional help? Reach out to us anytime.

faq.q1: How do live Khutbah translations work?
faq.a1: Aban uses advanced AI speech-to-text and machine translation to process the Imam's voice in real-time and provide subtitles and audio in your language.
faq.q2: How can I change my preferred language?
faq.a2: You can change your language from the Settings screen or by clicking on your profile and selecting 'Preferred Language'.
faq.a3: Authorized volunteers use the Aban app to record the live sermon from the mosque, which is then processed by our AI servers.
faq.a4: Translations may have a slight delay due to network speed or the time needed for the AI to process and translate the speech accurately.
faq.q5: How can I report incorrect translations?
faq.a5: You can provide feedback on translation accuracy immediately after each Khutbah session ends.

about.title: About Aban
about.subtitle: Bridging language barriers in Friday Khutbahs through AI-powered translation technology.
about.description:
Aban is a real-time Khutbah translation platform designed to make Friday sermons more accessible to non-Arabic-speaking Muslims in Saudi Arabia and beyond.

By integrating speech recognition, machine translation, and audio synthesis technologies, Aban enables worshippers to listen to and read translated Khutbahs in real time while preserving the sanctity and meaning of Islamic terminology.

The platform also empowers volunteers to contribute by capturing Khutbahs and adding mosques, helping expand accessibility across communities.
about.missionText: To strengthen spiritual connection and community engagement by making Friday Khutbahs understandable for Muslims of all linguistic backgrounds.

feedback.title: How was the Khutbah?
